title: campanula rotundifolia subsp. pusilla
intro: Campanula rotundifolia subsp. pusilla, also known as the small bellflower or alpine campanula, is a subspecies of the Campanula rotundifolia species, a type of flowering plant in the bellflower family. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to soothe and calm the body. The health benefits of Campanula rotundifolia subsp. pusilla include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion for its herbal uses, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
